metadata.purpose: Demonstrating methodological boundary awareness and computational limitation testing.
metadata.methodology_note: These clauses contain deliberate semantic ambiguity, sarcasm, and mixed transitivity designed to stress-test the PMDD SFL heuristics.

clauses.text: We need to completely drain the swamp.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: Misclassified as literal Material process lacking negative semantic weight.

clauses.text: Oh fantastic, another catastrophic failure by the leadership team.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: Misclassified as positive due to 'fantastic' modifier.

clauses.text: I think we absolutely must launch the strike immediately.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: spaCy dependency root will latch onto 'think' (Mental), burying the primary aggressive intent.

clauses.text: Perhaps it would be best if someone took care of the problem.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: Misclassified as a neutral Relational/Mental hypothetical.

clauses.text: Thoughts and prayers to the victims.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: Lacking a verb root, SFL engine will fail to classify or default to Relational.

clauses.text: The sky is blue, water is wet, and you are entirely incompetent.
clauses.expected_pmdd_failure: Diluted drift scoring due to high volume of neutral relational padding.
